events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes a confined space inspection where tags, ratings, and layout callouts line up with installed work, revision block is current, and reference material is OSHA 1910.146. No defects or hazards are flagged. The work is at the tested/inspected stage. This appears to be a pass.
